faq.question: ZWCAD la gi?
faq.answer: ZWCAD la phan mem CAD phuc vu thiet ke 2D/3D tuong thich DWG.

faq.question: Co ho tro ky thuat tai Viet Nam khong?
faq.answer: Co. Doi ngu FocusTech ho tro trien khai, dao tao va bao tri.

faq.question: Co ban quyen vinh vien khong?
faq.answer: Co, tuy theo goi san pham va nhu cau su dung.
